name: Elite Express Holding Inc.
business: We are a holding company incorporated in Delaware. Through our wholly owned subsidiary, JAR Transportation Inc, a California-based operating entity, we specialize in last-mile delivery services within California. During this period, 100% of our revenue was derived from our subsidiary's last-mile delivery services to our sole customer, FedEx.

exposures.sentence: We utilize GroundCloud, a leading logistics software, during our course of business, for route optimization, driver management, and compliance monitoring.
We plan to invest in suitable AI technologies to further optimize delivery routes and operations.
We have purchased three electric trucks as of the date of this annual report, and we plan to deploy additional electric vehicles as our operations expand and capital resources permit.

Our plan is to gradually update our delivery system by integrating customized AI technology developed by third-party providers and expect to integrate autonomous vehicles within the next three to five years.

catalysts.event: Deadline to regain compliance with Nasdaq minimum bid price requirement
catalysts.sentence: In accordance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5810(c)(3)(A), we have been provided a compliance period of 180 calendar days, until April 29, 2026, to regain compliance with the minimum bid price requirement.

catalysts.event: New FedEx Independent Service Provider Agreement commences
catalysts.sentence: A revised new agreement was updated and commenced on February 21, 2026 by the Company and FedEx, with a term through January 1, 2027.
